name: openheader
description: A lightweight open-source extension to modify request and response headers and filter by URL regexes.

scripts.zip:chrome: npm run build:chrome && cd dist/chrome && zip -r -FS ../openheader-chrome.zip .
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && zip -r -FS ../openheader-firefox.zip .
scripts.zip: npm run zip:chrome && npm run zip:firefox
